title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official CLI and server for running large language models locally (Llama 3, Mistral, Gemma, etc.) with a simple API and Docker support.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama; install via pip install ollama to chat with local models in a few lines.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node & browsers; npm install ollama.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package providing Ollama LLM, embed and callback handlers.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (chat UI, model management, multi-user, OpenAI-compat).

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama with fluent API and Android support.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Community Ruby gem for chatting with Ollama from Ruby/Rails apps.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Rust-based CLI wrapper around Ollama with REPL and prompt templates.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension bringing local Ollama models as GitHub-Copilot-like inline completions.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with autoscaling and PVC support.

title: ollama-docker-compose
summary: Official Docker & docker-compose examples for CPU and GPU setups.

title: ollama-chat
summary: Minimal React chat app backed by Ollama, useful as a starter template.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Retrieval-augmented generation demo using Ollama + Chroma for local docs.

title: ollama-nix
summary: Nix derivation for installing Ollama declaratively on NixOS.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration to use Ollama models as generators or embedders in pipelines.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: Unofficial C# / .NET client for Ollama with async streaming support.

title: ollama-logseq
summary: Logseq plugin that adds local AI assistance using Ollama models.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Self-hosted Discord bot that lets servers chat with local Ollama models.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian community plugin for local AI text generation via Ollama.

title: ollama-macos-swiftui
summary: Native macOS SwiftUI app that wraps Ollama for chat and model management.
